article_title: PrismML Exits Stealth With First Commercially Viable 1-Bit Large Language Models, Fitting an 8B-Parameter Model in 1.15 GB

content_preview.title: PrismML Exits Stealth With First Commercially Viable 1-Bit Large Language Models, Fitting an 8B-Parameter Model in 1.15 GB
content_preview.summary: A Caltech spinout backed by Khosla Ventures has released a family of fully 1-bit language models under Apache 2.0 that compress an 8-billion-parameter model to 1.15 GB while matching full-precision rivals on standard benchmarks.
content_preview.body_excerpt:
## Overview

PrismML, a startup founded by Caltech researchers, emerged from stealth on March 31 with what it calls the first commercially viable family of fully 1-bit large language models. The flagship [1-bit Bonsai 8B compresses an 8.19-billion-parameter model into 1.15 GB of memory](https://www.prnewswire.com/news-releases/prismml-launches-worlds-first-1-bit-ai-model-to-redefine-intelligence-at-the-edge-302730568.html) -- a 14x reduction from the 16.38 GB required by the same architecture at...
